parsed_output.justification: Both Kaelan and Jessica claim to be the Minion, a role that is aligned with Team Werewolf. Jessica's claim is particularly suspicious because she states she was the Minion but did not see any Werewolves, whereas the Minion role always identifies the Werewolves during the Night phase. Since only one player can be the Minion, at least one of them is lying, and Jessica's logical inconsistency makes her the most likely candidate for elimination to help Team Village.
